post_study_work_visa.name: Work Permit (Z Visa)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Requires employer sponsorship. 2 years work experience typically required. Easier in special economic zones.

language_requirement: Mandarin Chinese required for most domestic programs. CEIBS and joint programs taught in English.
scholarship_availability: Moderate — Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) for international students. CEIBS offers merit-based grants. Some programs offer full tuition scholarships.
path_to_pr: Chinese Green Card (very difficult to obtain). Most expats work on renewable work permits. Permanent residence requires 4+ years continuous residence.
test_policy: GMAT accepted at international programs. Domestic programs require national MBA entrance exam (MBA联考). GRE increasingly accepted.
